name: icml-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) submissions: topic fit, submission checks, author response, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, supplementary material, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in official ICML 2026 CFP, author instructions, peer-review FAQ, and LLM-review policy checked on 2026-06-01.
